mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO trade_cal (exchange, cal_date, is_open, pretrade_date, is_first_of_week, is_last_of_week, is_first_of_month, is_last_of_month, is_first_of_quarter, is_last_of_quarter) VALUES
(#{item.exchange}, #{item.calDate}, #{item.isOpen}, #{item.pretradeDate}, #{item.isFirstOfWeek}, #{item.isLastOfWeek}, #{item.isFirstOfMonth}, #{item.isLastOfMonth}, #{item.isFirstOfQuarter}, #{item.isLastOfQuarter})
mapper.update: UPDATE trade_cal SET is_first_of_week = #{isFirstOfWeek}, is_last_of_week = #{isLastOfWeek}, is_first_of_month = #{isFirstOfMonth}, is_last_of_month = #{isLastOfMonth}, is_first_of_quarter = #{isFirstOfQuarter}, is_last_of_quarter = #{isLastOfQuarter} WHERE exchange = #{exchange} AND cal_date = #{calDate}
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM trade_cal WHERE
(exchange = #{item.exchange} AND cal_date = #{item.calDate})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM trade_cal a JOIN trade_cal b ON a.cal_date = b.cal_date WHERE a.exchange = 'SSE' AND b.exchange = 'SZSE' AND a.cal_date >= #{startDate} AND a.is_open != b.is_open
